items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: Sephira. The Roya. The Exoswarm. Our architecture and culture… must be protected.

items.speaker: Talkie
items.text: Sephira, I—

items.speaker: Unknown (83)
items.text: Dhalifa gently pats Talkie, signaling she'll speak for herself.

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: The Void Storm… erases. Devours. Everything... gone.

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: Spacetrek Observatory... surveys. Records. Our history. The land of Lahai-Roi... remembered.

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: Face. Danger. I... make contribution.

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: I stay... in Observatory. Watch over... you. Everyone. Lahai-Roi.

items.speaker: Sephira
items.text: But aren't you scared?! It's an impossible fight! Why does it have to be you?!

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: Not afraid. Our people… Lahai-Roi… disappearing. That... I'm afraid.

items.speaker: Talkie
items.text: Warning! Warning! Vital signs unstable! Dhalifa needs rest! Let me translate! Let me translate!

options.text: Sephira, do you see Dhalifa's determination now?

items.speaker: Sephira
items.text: …I know. I've always known. Every Roya knows how terrifying the Void Storm is. And I know better than anyone how hard Dhalifa and the Spacetrek Collective have fought against it.

items.speaker: Sephira
items.text: I know what you're doing is for the greater good, but I'm not like you two. I just want to keep my best friend safe.

options.text: You can't protect Dhalifa by sabotaging her work.

items.speaker: Sephira
items.text: I truly am sorry. I understand how much effort has gone into this. I know I shouldn't have done it. But—

options.text: What Dhalifa needs now is your help.

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: Sephira. Help me. Your atonement. You'll understand… eventually.

items.speaker: Sephira
items.text: …I don't know. But I should take responsibility for my impulsive actions. And if Dhalifa's asking... then yes. Please, let me help with the reconstruction.

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: Look at this view. All thanks to you.

items.speaker: Talkie
items.text: "The researchers at the Observatory used to come here after work, just to feel the wind. They'd sip on a warm drink and admire the Etching Plains. Thanks to you, we can see this sight again," says Dhalifa!

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: One last phase, and the toughest one. But... not worried.

items.speaker: Talkie
items.text: "The final step is rebuilding the Observatory's main structure. It's the most complex part and needs the most resources, but with you and so many helping hands here, I feel confident," says Dhalifa!

items.speaker: Dhalifa
items.text: Take a rest. Feel the breeze.

items.speaker: Talkie
items.text: "No need to hurry, {PlayerName}. Rest here for a while. This view belongs to you too," says Dhalifa!
